name: Cinnamon Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients with a hand mixer until well combined. Set aside in the refrigerator.
2. Take 1 sandwich loaf of white bread, cut off the crusts, and flatten each piece with a rolling pin. Spread with the cream cheese mixture.
3. Roll up each flattened bread piece. Arrange seam side down on a 9 x 13 pan with sides.
4. Combine cinnamon, melted butter or margarine, and sugar in a separate bowl. Dip each rollup in the cinnamon mixture.
5. Place the rollups in the refrigerator to chill for at least 15 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit before serving. Best enjoyed chilled.
